category.id: {"en":"Refrigerator / cold appliance","zh":"电冰箱/制冷器具","zht":"電冰箱/製冷器具"}
category.scope_note: Household refrigerator and cold appliance comparison: China domestic compliance vs India BIS, BEE, electrical safety, refrigerant, and import registration requirements.

title.en: China-to-India Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入印度：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入印度：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance against India BIS registration/conformity assessment, BEE star labelling for frost-free and direct-cool refrigerators, IS 302 electrical safety, Ozone Rules refrigerant controls, and import documentation requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规与印度BIS注册/合格评定、无霜及直冷电冰箱BEE星级标识、IS 302电气安全、臭氧规则制冷剂管控及进口文件要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規與印度BIS登記/合格評定、無霜及直冷電冰箱BEE星級標識、IS 302電氣安全、臭氧規則製冷劑管控及進口文件要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, BIS licence/registration approval, BEE label permission, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Indian legislation, Quality Control Orders, BIS and BEE procedures, refrigerant restrictions, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、BIS许可证/注册批准、BEE标签许可或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行印度法律、质量控制令、BIS和BEE程序、制冷剂限制及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、BIS許可證/登記批准、BEE標籤許可或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行印度法律、品質管制令、BIS和BEE程序、製冷劑限制及海關要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face five major India compliance gaps: (1) BIS market access under the BIS Act framework, including product-family review against refrigerator standards such as IS 1476 and IS 7872 where applicable; (2) BEE star labelling permission and model registration for frost-free and direct-cool refrigerators before sale; (3) electrical safety evidence against the IS 302 series, with Indian Standards used as conformity benchmarks rather than automatically interchangeable with Chinese CCC test data; (4) refrigerant and foam-blowing-agent review under India's Ozone Depleting Substances rules, especially for HCFC/HFC legacy models; and (5) import clearance alignment with BIS/BEE registration documents, Indian importer responsibility, labels, model identifiers, and test reports.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临五大印度合规差距：（1）依据BIS Act框架完成BIS市场准入，包括在适用时按IS 1476、IS 7872等电冰箱标准进行产品族审查；（2）无霜和直冷电冰箱在销售前须取得BEE星级标签许可并完成型号注册；（3）依据IS 302系列形成电气安全证据，印度标准作为合格推定基准，不能自动与中国CCC检测数据互换；（4）依据印度臭氧消耗物质规则审查制冷剂及发泡剂，尤其关注HCFC/HFC旧型号；（5）进口清关须与BIS/BEE注册文件、印度进口商责任、标签、型号标识及检测报告保持一致。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨五大印度合規差距：（1）依據BIS Act框架完成BIS市場准入，包括在適用時按IS 1476、IS 7872等電冰箱標準進行產品族審查；（2）無霜和直冷電冰箱在銷售前須取得BEE星級標籤許可並完成型號登記；（3）依據IS 302系列形成電氣安全證據，印度標準作為合格推定基準，不能自動與中國CCC檢測數據互換；（4）依據印度臭氧消耗物質規則審查製冷劑及發泡劑，尤其關注HCFC/HFC舊型號；（5）進口清關須與BIS/BEE登記文件、印度進口商責任、標籤、型號識別及檢測報告保持一致。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Indian regulator, ministry, standards body, Gazette, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs not accepted. BIS, BEE, Ozone Cell/MoEFCC, and India Code/Gazette sources are preferred for India requirements.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
